semantic_version_t(3) Library Functions Manual semantic_version_t(3)

NAME

semantic_version_t - Parsed semantic version structure.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/version.h>

Data Fields


int major
Major version (0 to INT_MAX). int minor
Minor version (0 to INT_MAX). int patch
Patch version (0 to INT_MAX). bool valid
True if parsing succeeded.

Detailed Description

Parsed semantic version structure.

Definition at line 46 of file version.h.
